text: Upon entering this slick, modern hallway and then stepping into this vibrant, intellectual exhibit space, I feel curiosity blooming within me. The atmosphere feels both clinical and creative—a juxtaposition of sterile safety and the colorful playground of ideas. I am compelled to explore what 'R+D' means in this setting, acutely aware of the boundary between the known and the speculative, and I feel oddly excited to bridge that divide.
